description_long: This object is a robust, freestanding barbell rack with an integrated barbell and pull-up bar, commonly found in urban gyms or outdoor fitness parks. The frame is constructed from thick, tubular steel with a glossy black finish, featuring two vertical posts connected by horizontal supports and a wide, stable base. The barbell is mounted across the front, supported by adjustable hooks, and extends beyond the width of the frame. The upper section includes a multi-grip pull-up bar with angled handles, while the midsection has additional pegs for storing weight plates or accessories. The overall design is utilitarian, emphasizing durability and stability for heavy lifting. No weight plates are currently loaded on the barbell, and the structure is designed to accommodate various strength training exercises.
description: A heavy-duty black steel barbell rack with an integrated barbell and pull-up bar, featuring storage pegs and a wide, stable base. The design is functional and built for strength training in urban fitness settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the vertical steel frame, storage pegs, and the pull-up bar's angled handles at the top.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barbell mounted across the frame, the pull-up bar above, and the symmetrical base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the frame's profile, storage pegs, and the pull-up bar's structure.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the frame, the barbell's shaft, and the open base structure.
attribute_knurled_grip_pattern: Knurled grip pattern is present on the outer sections of the barbell shaft, likely diamond style, with smooth sections in the center and near the collars; no visible powerlifting rings.
attribute_central_rotating_sleeve: Rotating sleeves are present at each end of the barbell, indicated by the segmented construction and slight seams, typical of Olympic-style barbells.
attribute_end_cap_design: End caps are cylindrical, metallic silver, with a smooth finish and no visible logos or markings; no decorative elements or fasteners are apparent.
